title: Crayon branch manifest (.crayon/manifest.json)
description: Branch-scoped whole-tree index. One per branch root. The authoritative map of every node in the branch tree to its kind and (where applicable) its Google Doc id.

schemaVersion.description: Bumped on any breaking change to this schema.

branch.description: Git branch name this manifest describes (also the Drive folder name).

tree.description: Flat list of nodes; hierarchy is implied by the slash-separated path.

path.description: Repo-relative POSIX path. For 'file' a .md path; for 'doc'/'folder' a directory path (no trailing slash).

kind.description: 'file' = untabbed Doc (single .md); 'doc' = tabbed Doc (directory + .crayon-tabs.json); 'folder' = plain Drive folder (directory, no marker).

docId.description: Google Doc id. Required for 'file' and 'doc'; absent for 'folder'.
